theme_archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury. A premium, moody, cinematic dark theme inspired by Apple, Linear, and Rockstar Games. It prioritizes mystery, anticipation, and quality over loud neon or standard esports aesthetics.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-medium tracking-tighter leading-tight
rules.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-sunset-orange
rules.notes: Never use Inter for headings. Use Outfit for a sleek, modern premium feel. Headings must be tightly tracked.

color_palette.rules: Avoid RGB effects and glowing rainbow gradients. Use accents very sparingly to draw attention to interactive elements (like the waitlist CTA). Everything should feel grounded and high-end.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Elements should have room to breathe.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento 'Tetris' grid for feature sections (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6 or gap-8).

surface_strategies.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-[#0A0A0A]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5.
surface_strategies.cards: Solid bg-[#1E2228] with incredibly subtle 1px border-white/5. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and glow via box-shadow or border-white/15.
surface_strategies.modals: Dark overlays (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm) with cards matching the main UI.

motion_and_interaction.library: framer-motion and lenis for smooth scrolling.
motion_and_interaction.style: Extremely subtle. Fade in, slight slide up (y: 20 -> 0), scale (0.98 -> 1), soft hover states. No bouncy or playful animations.
motion_and_interaction.hero_parallax: Subtle mouse parallax on the hero mockup.

component_instructions.buttons: Primary: Solid sunset_orange background or subtle metallic gradient, text-[#0A0A0A] or white depending on contrast. Secondary: Transparent with border-white/10 and text-white. All buttons must have rounded-full or slightly rounded corners based on layout.
component_instructions.inputs: Shadcn UI Input, customized to dark theme: bg-[#16181D] border-white/10 text-[#F5F5F2] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-sunset_orange.
component_instructions.accordion: Shadcn UI Accordion for FAQ, extremely clean, minimal borders.

hero_background_texture.description: Dark cinematic luxury texture, use at very low opacity (10-20%) as a base background layer to kill digital flatness.

hero_mockup_placeholder.description: Miami night city skyline. Use inside the UI mockup/dashboard concept art.

map_preview.description: Dark city map navigation. Apply heavy blur and overlay 'Interactive Map / Coming Soon'.

ai_avatar_abstract.description: Abstract metallic silver spheres. Use as the avatar or background visual for the AI Companion Preview section.

palm_silhouette.description: Palm tree silhouette. Use sparingly as an ambient background in the footer or waitlist section.

pages_structure.features: Floating glass sticky nav, metallic silver 'VH' logo, Links: Features, Roadmap, FAQ. CTA: 'Join Waitlist'. Mobile hamburger.

Headline: 'The Ultimate GTA 6 Companion Is Almost Here.', curiosity copy, launch countdown, 'Launching alongside GTA 6' disclaimer. Buttons: Primary 'Join Waitlist', Secondary 'See What's Coming'. Visual: Large cinematic premium UI product mockup with subtle mouse parallax and soft lighting.
Premium clickable cards for AI Companion, Interactive Map, Mission Guide, etc. All say 'Coming Soon'. Clicking opens a polished concept preview modal.
Mockup of a premium chat interface. Clickable suggested questions, beautifully designed placeholder answers. Abstract metallic sphere as AI visual identity.
Large blurred map concept, overlay 'Interactive Map / Coming Soon'. Beautiful markers, search/filter UI shell partially hidden to build curiosity.
Bento grid of elegant cards (Explore Faster, Track Progress, etc.), minimal copy.
Premium dense grid. Icon + Title + Small Subtitle. Topics: Mission Database, Vehicles, Achievements, etc. All labeled 'Coming Soon'.
Animated roadmap (Today -> Join Waitlist -> GTA 6 Launch -> ViceHub Launch). Linear style, subtle active glowing node.
Headline: 'Be Ready Before Everyone Else.', Email input + Large CTA. Privacy note, instant confirmation UI state.
Shadcn accordion. Premium, minimal borders. Short answers.
Minimal premium footer. Logo, social placeholders, legal links.

testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, accordions, modals) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-join-waitlist-btn').
